games.name: Karlson
games.desc: Karlson is a milk-infused fellow, on a mission to take down anyone in his way to secure the milk.

games.name: Nothing
games.desc: The hardest game you're ever going to play. Or is it? Just do Nothing as the timer goes up. If you do Something, you lose.

games.name: Milkman Karlson
games.desc:
Karlson is thristy, and only you can help him get his milk. 
 Fight through 19 different levels to help Karlson retrieve his milk!

games.name: Something
games.desc: The easiest game you're ever going to play. Or is it? Keep doing Something as the timer goes up. If you do Nothing, you lose. If you don't like doing something, go do nothing
